---
title: Remote work distribution varies by rural region
description: Density plot showing the distribution of remote work rates by rural Census
  region.
date: '2026-05-07'
layout: default
permalink: /charts/rural-economic-outlook-remote-work-density-rural-regions/
categories:
  - Chart
  - Labor Market
  - Technology
  - Geography
tags:
  - ACS
  - Remote Work
  - Telework
  - Rural
  - Regional
  - Density Plot
image: remote_work_density_rural_regions.svg
chart:
  title: Remote work distribution varies by rural region
  chartType: density
  interactive: false
  dataSource: U.S. Census Bureau, American Community Survey
  sourceUrl: https://www.census.gov/programs-surveys/acs
  featured: false
producedBy: rural-economic-outlook
usesDatasets:
  - american-community-survey
usesPackages:
  - ruraldefinitions
usesResources: []
format:
  gfm:
    toc: false
    wrap: none
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

![This density plot shows the county-level distribution of remote work rates within each rural Census region.](./remote_work_density_rural_regions.svg)

## Overview

This density plot shows the county-level distribution of remote work rates within each rural Census region.

## Key Findings

- Remote work distributions vary significantly by rural region
- Rural West counties show a wider range of remote work rates
- Rural Midwest and South have more concentrated distributions at lower rates

## Reproducibility

Generated by `R/viz/presentation/remote_work_density_plot.R` in the producing project.
